examples: It was in this casual way that Wendy one morning made a disquieting revelation.
Most disquieting reflection of all, was it not bad form to think about good form?
It must be the summer air that affects me with feelings almost as disquieting as they are refreshing.
They give as much of the disquieting information to as many people as is practical.
Despite the temporary fix in Cyprus, more disquieting news is likely in the future.
